name: Player Position & Look
desc: Forces the player to a specific position and rotation. The client must respond with a C04/05/06.
notes: The client must send a movement confirm (C04/C05/C06) back. The Y coordinate in this packet is the head Y, not feet Y.

implementation.overview: S08PacketPlayerPosLook is sent by the server to forcefully correct the client's position and rotation. It carries absolute position (x,y,z), yaw/pitch, and a flags byte (relative position: 0x01=x, 0x02=y, 0x04=z, 0x08=yaw, 0x10=pitch). This is the most important clientbound packet for movement hacks because it is the server's way of saying "you're not where you should be." Flight modules MUST cancel S08 to prevent the server from pulling the player back to ground. Speed modules cancel it to prevent rubberbanding. Disabler modules spoof C06 responses to S08. Freecam cancels it to keep the camera free. NoRotate strips the rotation data. NoClip sends confirm + positions back. FlagDetector watches for S08 as an indicator of anti-cheat flags. Backtrack delays S08 for reach extension.

modules.name: Flight (Packet Mode — S08 Cancel + C06 Spoof)
modules.purpose: The core of packet flight. Cancel the server's position correction and send back a spoofed position to maintain fly state.
modules.how_it_works: When S08 arrives, cancel it (event.setCancelled). Then send a C06PacketPlayerPosLook back with the same position data from S08 but modified Y (e.g., Y - 0.03, Y + some offset) that maintains the player's current height. The server receives the C06 and updates the position to wherever the client claims to be, effectively letting the client control its vertical position.

modules.name: Disabler — S08 Mod/Cancel
modules.purpose: Modify or cancel S08 as part of a larger disabler that prevents anti-cheat from checking movement.
modules.how_it_works: Multiple techniques: (1) Cancel S08 completely. (2) Modify the Y value to hide movement. (3) Send back a C06 with the S08 data but confirm teleport. (4) On Verus, modify S08 Y by subtracting 0.015625. (5) On Hypixel, cancel S08 when doneLoadingTerrain.

modules.name: NoRotate — Strip server rotations
modules.purpose: Prevent the server from changing the player's yaw/pitch.
modules.how_it_works: Intercept S08 and override the packet's yaw/pitch fields with the current client-side rotation values. The server intended to force a new rotation (e.g., anti-cheat correction), but the module replaces the values before they reach the player.

modules.name: Freecam — Block S08
modules.purpose: Prevent the server from pulling the player's camera back to their real body position.
modules.how_it_works: When in freecam mode, cancel all S08 packets. The server continuously tries to correct the camera position back to the real body, but cancelling S08 keeps the camera wherever the player moved it.

modules.name: NoClip (S08 confirm + cancel)
modules.purpose: Allows walking through blocks by responding to S08 with confirm teleport then cancelling.
modules.how_it_works: When S08 arrives (because server detected player inside a block): (1) Send C00PacketConfirmTeleport with S08's teleport ID. (2) Send C04/C06 back with the position the player actually wants. (3) Cancel the original S08. The server receives the confirm and thinks the player teleported correctly, but the client cancels the visual correction.

modules.name: FlagDetector — Auto-disable on S08
modules.purpose: Auto-disable speed/fly modules when an S08 arrives (indicating an anti-cheat flag/lag-back).
modules.how_it_works: If S08 is received while a movement module is enabled, automatically toggle off the module to avoid getting banned. The S08 is a strong indicator that the server detected abnormal movement.

implementation.general_hooks: NetHandlerPlayClient.handlePlayerPosLook() — the vanilla handler. Modules hook via EventReceivePacket. The position uses absolute double values. The flags byte determines which fields are relative (0x01=x, 0x02=y, 0x04=z, 0x08=yaw, 0x10=pitch).
implementation.client_variations:
Mint B1: Multiple disabler modes that modify or cancel S08 (Verus, HSD, Spigot, PacketFly).
Gugustus: Disabler spectate mode responds with C06. Speed handles S08 for bypass.
Astro 2.2.1: NoRotate strips rotation. PingSpoof intercepts S08 timing.
Tenacity 6.0: Multiple modules handle S08 for flight/speed bypass.
Celestial 6.0: Flight cancels S08. NoClip confirms + cancels. FlagDetector auto-disables on S08.
